creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port updated, thanks! 
1) It is not that ugly 
2) With INFO=ess, you don't need to put ess.info or dir in the plist, 
it is already handled 
3) I usually use poudriere testport, or testport -n / bulk -t, no problem 
with this port with both
